_comment: The trigger window. A narrative timeline, not a chart. danger_window drives the crimson band shaded across every time-series on the page.

phases.title: Presidential-cycle weakness
phases.body: The historically weakest stretch of the four-year cycle. Seasonality turns against the market just as valuations sit at record highs.

phases.title: Mid-term election uncertainty
phases.body: Policy and tax uncertainty around the mid-terms adds volatility. Institutions de-risk into the unknown.

phases.title: IPO lock-up expirations
phases.body: The trigger. Lock-ups expire on a wave of mega-IPOs — SpaceX, OpenAI, Anthropic — releasing trillions in insider shares to sell. Liquidity drains from an already overextended market. This is when the music stops.
